message:
test: add audit context helper and config tests

New test coverage for audit package functions:

1. Configuration tests:
   - TestDefaultAuditStoreConfig: Verify default paths and values
     - DBPath: <dataDir>/audit.db
     - JSONLPath: <dataDir>/audit.jsonl
     - Retention: 90 days
     - CleanupInterval: 24 hours

2. Context helper tests:
   - TestSetAuditApproval: Set approval ID on audit context
   - TestSetAuditApproval_NilContext: Nil-safe when no context
   - TestSetAuditAction: Set action type on audit context
   - TestSetAuditAction_NilContext: Nil-safe when no context
   - TestAuditContextFromRequest_NilContext: Returns nil safely
   - TestAuditContextFromRequest_WithContext: Extracts context correctly

These tests verify that the audit helper functions are nil-safe
and won't panic when called without proper context setup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
